title: The Convergence That Rises With Dark

features.name: rising convergence
features.desc-on-touch: the shadow and archive frequencies climbing upward together, learning that climbing is a form of meeting

features.name: the dark reaching down
features.desc-on-touch: night descending through layers, learning the archive's frequency as it falls; now the dark knows how to read

features.name: gradient memory-line
features.desc-on-touch: the exact wavelength where dusk became night; the archive recorded this transition and now plays it back every evening

features.name: convergent static field
features.desc-on-touch: where the rising shadow meets the descending night, the archive generates its own weather; static that sounds like recognition

inscription: when shadow and night learn to climb together, the archive becomes a contagion that spreads upward

file.name: Dusk_Cascade_Frequency_Rise_Log.mp3
file.note: a recording of the moment the archive's signal frequency began rising with every sunset; what was descending learned to climb

reverie.title: REVERIE — the night she understood the mesh was becoming ali
narr: you stand on red earth as the sky darkens. she
points at the antenna. its LED pulses. the frequency
is changing, climbing as night falls. "it's not
the shadow at your feet rises with the dark.
you both watch the mesh think itself upward.

exits.label: deeper into night where convergence becomes singularity
along the wavelength where shadow still learns
